sections.paragraph:
Original: נזם

Transliteration: nezem

Phonetic: neh'-zem

BDB Definition:

  1. ring, nose ring, earring
    1. nose ring (woman's ornament)
    2. earring (ornament of men or women)

Origin: from an unused root of uncertain meaning

TWOT entry: 1338a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
